text.title: AWS IaC Templates Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the parameterised IaC template bundle artefact plus valid / invalid / forbidden examples.

section.title: Schema
Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: deletion_protection == false on RDS / S3 user-data resources

example.title: Plaintext storage + wildcard IAM
example.note: Multiple forbidden patterns triggered; reject and re-request.

text.reference: Validator script that enforces this contract.
